assertions.description: INCORRECT: The PCB analyzer reports 205 vias total: 119 signal vias (0.45mm/0.3mm) and 86 larger vias (0.9mm/0.6mm used for power/ground). The gerber drill classifier sees 119 holes at 0.3mm (correctly flagged as vias) but assigns the 86 holes at 0.6mm to 'component_holes' using the diameter heuristic. These are not component holes — the PCB has 2 THT components (tht_count=2 from PCB stats) which would account for only ~4-8 holes. The 86 holes at 0.6mm are power/GND stitching vias visible in the thermal analysis zone stitching data. The gerber analyzer's diameter-based via/component-hole boundary is too low, misclassifying large vias as component holes.
